analysis.ambiguity1: The 2% Transaction Fee: The Legal Team says the app cannot process payments (cash/Venmo only), so it is unclear how the app can track or collect a 2% fee.
analysis.ambiguity2: Barcode Scanning: The user wants to scan barcodes for book details, but it is vague where the book data (Title/Author) will be fetched from (e.g., an external API or bookstore database).
analysis.conflictSolution:
The Conflict: The Student Union wants a 2% transaction fee, but the Legal Team forbids the app from handling any money.
Proposed Solution: Remove the transaction fee. Instead, charge a flat "Listing Fee" via an official university payment portal, or use a "Freemium" model where student clubs pay to pin ads on the app.
